name: FriendRequestProcessor

neutralConcepts: T81 inline privacy check before storeDocument or FriendRequestSent
Mutual pending auto-forward: if B already sent to A, auto-accept both
SETNX idempotency on requestId — duplicate requests return existing
knowledgeScope PRIVATE — connection requests scoped to tenant

ironRules.rule: T81 PrivacyGatekeeper.check() called inline before storeDocument or FriendRequestSent emit — queue-driven privacy check = BUILD_FAILURE
connectionId = hash(sorted([userIdA, userIdB]) + ':' + tenantId) — direction-independent. hash(A+B) === hash(B+A)
Mutual pending auto-forward: if reverse request exists (B→A pending), treat as mutual acceptance and route to T74 accept path
SETNX idempotency on requestId — duplicate FriendRequestReceived events return existing request record (no second write)

keywords: friend request processor T73 privacy gate inline SETNX idempotency connection ID direction independent
